completion_criteria_checked: A local deterministic enforcement step exists that checks restart safety before fresh-session handoff artifacts are treated as ready.
The enforcement reuses the generated advisor restart brief, the generated worker directive, and canonical repo truth rather than introducing hidden script-only truth.
The enforcement fails clearly on stale or incomplete handoff inputs and passes on valid inputs.
The change stays within the approved V1 scope and preserves local deterministic behavior.
The enforcement remains narrowly scoped and does not introduce broad orchestration or paid dependencies.
Claude returns evidence in .cockpit/result/worker-result.md using the required format.
risks: Live state is still not validated against JSON Schema at runtime.
The handoff gate is still invoked on demand rather than being triggered automatically before every fresh-session handoff.
The gate verdict in .cockpit/state/handoff-gate.json is a point-in-time record and must be re-run after later task or handoff changes.
summary: Claude completed the bounded pcc-v1-009 task within scope by adding a deterministic handoff gate that blocks fresh-session use unless the active task is ready_for_worker and the dual-restart proof passes from canonical repo truth.
next_action: Pause at the natural break, review the verified handoff gate, and choose the next bounded follow-on task.
